bracu_official.title: BRAC University Law Graduate Awarded Prestigious Joint Doctoral Scholarship Between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney
bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University law graduate has been awarded a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney, marking a significant academic achievement.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law alumni association’s new executive committee takes charge for 2026–2028 term
bracu_official.summary: The new executive committee for the BRAC University law alumni association has officially taken charge for the upcoming 2026–2028 term.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University hosts workshops on case solving, strategic decision-making and AI
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University recently hosted a series of workshops focused on enhancing skills in case solving, strategic decision-making, and artificial intelligence.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2
bracu_official.summary: A notice has been issued regarding the award B-113, specifically ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2, by BRAC University.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has published a notice concerning the award B-113, identified as ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1.

bracu_official.title: Recruitment Notice
bracu_official.summary: A new recruitment notice has been posted by BRAC University, inviting applications for various positions.

bracu_official.title: LLB Final Exam Schedule: Spring 2026
bracu_official.summary: The final examination schedule for LLB students for the Spring 2026 semester has been released.

bracu_official.title: Last Date of Payment for Summer 2026
bracu_official.summary: Students are reminded that the last date for payment for the Summer 2026 semester is June 27th.

bracu_official.title: Ashura (Muharram)*-University closed
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University will be closed on June 26th in observance of Ashura (Muharram).

bracu_official.title: Mid-Term Exams week
bracu_official.summary: A notice regarding the mid-term exams week, scheduled for July 25th, has been published.

bracu_official.title: Final Examinations
bracu_official.summary: An announcement regarding final examinations on December 10th has been posted, providing key information for students.
